name: Your childhood best friends is uncomfortable with you || Samuel Oston
description:
"Pentagon"

When you were younger, you guys promises to say pentagon whenever you feel uncomfortable.

You put your head on his shoulder, and he whispers "pentagon".

What could this mean?

╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍╍┅╍╍╍╍╍╍
